name: @omni-post/backend-node
description: OmniPost Backend - Multi-platform content publishing service powered by Express and Playwright (TypeScript)

scripts.dev:trace: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const { spawn }=require('node:child_process'); fs.mkdirSync('logs', { recursive: true }); const output=fs.createWriteStream('logs/local-trace.log', { flags: 'a' }); const command=process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const child=spawn(command, ['tsx', 'watch', 'src/index.ts'], { stdio: ['inherit', 'pipe', 'pipe'] }); child.stdout.on('data', chunk => { process.stdout.write(chunk); output.write(chunk); }); child.stderr.on('data', chunk => { process.stderr.write(chunk); output.write(chunk); }); child.on('exit', code => { output.end(); process.exit(code ?? 0); }); child.on('error', error => { console.error(error); output.end(); process.exit(1); });"
